title: CBRE India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CBRE India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
